channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: At the side of 15 athelstan gardens, 19th June
item.description:
Lime bikes parked where it cant be seen

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kimberley Road, London

Light on during daylight

item.title: Young tree dead, 19th June
item.description:
Young tree is dead, please can it be replaced.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Young tree dead, 19th June
item.description:
Young tree, previously reported as needing watering, is now dead.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wickham Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Popeyes oil, 19th June
item.description:
Again. Are you actually ever going to stop this?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland High Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urino, 19th June
item.description:
Again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashwin Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt out vehicle on corner of new road and orchard road, 19th June
item.description:
A van was on fire this evening next to my neighbours house. They called the fire brigade who put the fire out and so now it is just a smouldering heap on the road which needs to be towed away. This is a hazard as the side door on the traffic side is open and can pose a danger to passing vehicles and possibly pedestrians too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbrooke Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bin bags dumped on the pavement outside 198 Southgate Road, 19th June
item.description:
Three black bin bags were left on the pavement against the wall here on Wednesday evening. This is the third time it has happened in recent weeks, always in exactly the same place.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southgate Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of litter, as though from a bin bag, next to the Cable TV cabinets in the short pedestrian section of Hardings Lane, Penge, 5m from the jct with Lennard Rd., 19th June
item.description:
Pile of litter, as though from a bin bag, next to the Cable TV cabinets in the short pedestrian section of Hardings Lane, Penge, 5m from the jct with Lennard Rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hardings Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red rectangular 'New road layout' lamp-column-mounted sign in Penge Lane, Penge opp jct with Bycroft Rd, 20m SW of the railway bridge, is faded and blistered., 19th June
item.description:
Red rectangular 'New road layout' lamp-column-mounted sign in Penge Lane, Penge opp jct with Bycroft Rd, 20m SW of the railway bridge, is faded and blistered. This Google Streetview image is from May 2025. Please either replace or just remove as the layout, whatever that is, is no longer 'new'.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penge Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed van and illegally parked regularly, 19th June
item.description:
Residents at number 47 have been driving an untaxed van for a couple months and have been illegally parked almost daily. Despite several parking tickets the vehicle continues to be illegally parked and untaxed. The van is normally parked around the mini roundabout by number 49.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edendale Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight disturbing sleep, 19th June
item.description:
There's excessive light pollution overspilling into my bedrooms disturbing sleep sat 10 County Grove. Please either fit a cowl to the streetlight outside the property or cover the cost of blackout blinds (probably the cheapest option).Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): County Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cut tree branches overhanging onto footpath, 19th June
item.description:
Tripping hazard - cut logs have been left in situ but overhang onto footpath so people could fall over them or bruise their legs. Especially dangerous at night when path isn't well lit.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glassmill Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Scooter blocking public pavement, 18th June
item.description:
Scooter meet in Public pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Harley Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned in oavement, 18th June
item.description:
See photo. Abandoned in pavement blocking public access

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Harley Road, Belsize Park, Greater London

item.title: Mattress dumped on street, 18th June
item.description:
Mattress dumped on corner of Whiteorth Road and a Herbert Road again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Noisy works being done at 11pm, 18th June
item.description:
Why are council men making noise at 11pm clanging metal, opening drains or manholes, using noisy machinery, at this time? It wouldn't be ok if it were a member of the public so why is it on to be doing noisy works as the council? If not the council then a utility. Not acceptable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Heathfield Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Utility Works and Temporary Traffic Lights

item.title: Rubbish left outside shop, 18th June
item.description:
Piles of rubbish outside convenience store

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Herbert Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped bin by bus stop C, 18th June
item.description:
Someone dumped their old rubbish bin on the street, and people have started to shove rubbish into it but it’s overflowing. This could be because the council removed the bin from the bus stop some time ago.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 129, Gipsy Hill, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of domestic waste piled up on pavement by 18 Rise, 18th June
item.description:
Domestic waste from houses left on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paget Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
